title: Tier B evidence boundary map

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: The settled Tier B conclusion is limitation-aware diagnostic external evidence, not a robust incremental-utility claim.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

panel_map.b: Status-count summary and Tier B interpretation.

evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: Do not promote rejected or blocked claim rows into manuscript claims.

statistics_notes: Cells encode accepted, not-supported, and blocked claim boundaries; text labels avoid color-only status encoding.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: Do not promote rejected or blocked claim rows into manuscript claims.
